ItemType.name: AST-2 Calibration ROM
ItemType.description: This ROM is loaded with scanner calibration software that will tune a ship's sensors to ignore asteroids without ore in a specific star system.

Language.Text: Can calibration sensors in up to level 2 systems.

ItemType.name: AST-4 Calibration ROM
ItemType.description: This ROM is loaded with scanner calibration software that will tune a ship's sensors to ignore asteroids without ore in a specific star system.

Language.Text: Can calibration sensors in up to level 4 systems.

ItemType.name: AST-6 Calibration ROM
ItemType.description: This ROM is loaded with scanner calibration software that will tune a ship's sensors to ignore asteroids without ore in a specific star system.

Language.Text: Can calibration sensors in up to level 6 systems.

ItemType.name: AST-8 Calibration ROM
ItemType.description: This ROM is loaded with scanner calibration software that will tune a ship's sensors to ignore asteroids without ore in a specific star system.

Language.Text: Can calibration sensors in up to level 8 systems.

ItemType.name: AST-10 Calibration ROM
ItemType.description: This ROM is loaded with scanner calibration software that will tune a ship's sensors to ignore asteroids without ore in a specific star system.

Language.Text: Can calibration sensors in up to level 10 systems.

Events.onUpdate:
(block ( (lastProgress (ovr@ gSource aOverlayID 'scanner.calibrationProgress)) (updateProgress (ovr@ gSource aOverlayID 'scanner.calibrationPerUpdate)) (curProgress (+ lastProgress updateProgress)) (calibrationROM (ovr@ gSource aOverlayID 'scanner.calibrationROM)) (targetSystem (ovr@ gSource aOverlayID 'scanner.targetSystem)) ) (switch ; We must still be in the correct system
(!= (sysGetNode) targetSystem) (block () (objAddItem gSource calibrationROM 1) (objSendMessage gSource () (typTranslate gType 'msgWrongSystem)) (objRemoveOverlay gSource aOverlayID) )
; see if we are still calibrating
(ls curProgress 100) (ovrInc@ gSource aOverlayID 'scanner.calibrationProgress updateProgress)
; otherwise handle the outcome
(block () (objSendMessage gSource () (typTranslate gType 'msgCalibrationComplete)) (objAddItem gSource calibrationROM 1) (objFireItemEvent gSource calibrationROM 'scanner.finishCalibration) (objRemoveOverlay gSource aOverlayID) ) ) )

Events.scanner.Scan:
(if (geq (or (itm@ gItem 'scanner.level) (itm@ gItem 'level)) (sysGetLevel)) ; We can only scan up to systems of our item level (block ( (range (itm@ gItem 'scanner.range)) (asteroids (if (gr range 0) ; We need to use a special filter (sysFindObject gSource (cat "t +asteroid N:" range)) ; Otherwise we scan all asteroids (sysFindObject gSource "t +asteroid") ) ) (fullScanWeapon (itm@ gItem 'scanner.fullScanWeapon)) (asteroidsWithOre 0) )
(if asteroids (block () ; Mark all unexplored asteroids with no ore ; as explored, so that we dont waste time on them (enum asteroids theAsteroid (if (objGetItems theAsteroid "* +ore|* +minable")
; If we have ore items then we need to see if we unveil full details about them ; ; we go through the full scanning logic here so that we can make use of different ; scanner powers
(block () (if fullScanWeapon (objDamage theAsteroid fullScanWeapon)) (setq asteroidsWithOre (+ asteroidsWithOre 1)) )
; We always set asteroids that have nothing in them to explored ; ; This mitigates the player wasting time on extremely un-fun shooting ; empty rocks with nothing in them
(objSet@ theAsteroid 'explored True) ) )
; Notify the user we were successful
(if (itm@ gItem 'scanner.enableMessages) (objSendMessage gSource () (typTranslate gType 'msgSuccess { asteroidsWithOre: asteroidsWithOre asteroidsTotal: (count asteroids) asteroidsPercent: (/ (* 100 asteroidsWithOre) (count asteroids)) })) )
; Identify the item and remove it if its disposable
(itmSetKnown gItem)
(if (itm@ gItem 'scanner.disposable) (objRemoveItem gSource gItem 1) ) )
; If there are no asteroids...
(block () ; Notify the user we have nothing to scan
(if (itm@ gItem 'scanner.enableMessages) (objSendMessage gSource () (typTranslate gType 'msgNoAsteroids)) )
; Identify the item if necessary
(itmSetKnown gItem) ) ) )
; Otherwise we cant scan in this system
(block ()
; Notify the user we were unsuccessful
(if (itm@ gItem 'scanner.enableMessages) (objSendMessage gSource () (typTranslate gType 'msgLevelTooLow)) )
; Now we know what the item is
(itmSetKnown gItem) ) )

Language.Text: Asteroids in system successfully scanned. %asteroidsWithOre% out of %asteroidsTotal% scanned asteroids contain minable materials.
The contents of this star system are too difficult to scan with this item.
There are no asteroids to scan.

Events.scanner.startCalibration: (block ( (theOverlay (objAddOverlay gSource &ovMiningCalibrationCounter;)) ) (ovrSet@ gSource theOverlay 'scanner.calibrationROM gItem) (ovrSet@ gSource theOverlay 'scanner.targetSystem (sysGetNode)) (objRemoveItem gSource gItem 1) )

Language.Text: Calibrated sensors detect %asteroidsPercent%% of asteroids in this system contain minable materials.
